category.title: Business Solutions
category.description: Digital business solutions for booking, messaging, customer communication, and automation.

seo.title: Ticket Booking Solution | Fillip Technologies
seo.description: Custom ticket booking platforms for events, travel, and venues - real-time seat selection, secure payments, and automated confirmations.

hero.title: Ticket Booking Systems
hero.description: Custom booking platforms for events, travel, and venues - real-time availability, secure payments, and instant confirmations that scale on your busiest day.

solutions.title: Real-Time Seat Selection
solutions.description: Interactive seat maps with live availability so customers pick exactly where they sit, with no double-booking.

solutions.title: Secure Payments
solutions.description: Integrated, PCI-compliant payment gateways with support for cards, UPI, and wallets for frictionless checkout.

solutions.title: QR & E-Tickets
solutions.description: Automated e-tickets with QR codes for fast, contactless entry and easy on-site validation.

solutions.title: Admin & Analytics
solutions.description: A dashboard to manage events, pricing, and inventory with real-time sales and attendance insights.

faqs.question: Can you handle high-traffic on-sale moments?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build booking systems that scale to handle sudden spikes in demand so your platform stays fast and reliable when tickets go live.

faqs.question: Which payment methods are supported?
faqs.answer: We integrate secure gateways supporting cards, UPI, net banking, and popular wallets, tailored to your market and audience.

faqs.question: Can it integrate with our existing systems?
faqs.answer: Yes. We integrate with your CRM, email/SMS providers, and accounting tools so bookings flow into the systems you already use.

faqs.question: Do customers get instant confirmation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Customers receive instant e-tickets with QR codes by email and SMS the moment payment is confirmed.

seo.title: SMS Communication Solution | Fillip Technologies
seo.description: Bulk SMS, OTP, and automated messaging platforms - reach customers instantly with reliable delivery, APIs, and campaign analytics.

hero.title: SMS Communication That
hero.description: Bulk SMS, OTP, and automated messaging built on reliable delivery - reach customers instantly with campaigns, alerts, and two-way conversations at scale.

solutions.title: Bulk SMS Campaigns
solutions.description: Send promotions, alerts, and updates to thousands of customers in seconds with high deliverability.

solutions.title: OTP & Verification
solutions.description: Fast, reliable one-time passwords for secure logins, transactions, and account verification.

solutions.title: Automated Alerts
solutions.description: Trigger transactional messages - order updates, reminders, and notifications - automatically via API.

solutions.title: Reporting & APIs
solutions.description: Developer-friendly APIs plus delivery reports and campaign analytics to measure every send.

faqs.question: How reliable is message delivery?
faqs.answer: We use established carrier routes and smart routing to maximise delivery rates and speed, with real-time delivery reports for full visibility.

faqs.question: Do you provide an API for developers?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer well-documented REST APIs so you can send OTPs, alerts, and campaigns directly from your applications.

faqs.question: Can we send transactional and promotional messages?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support both transactional (OTP, alerts) and promotional messaging, configured to comply with local regulations.

faqs.question: Is two-way messaging supported?
faqs.answer: We can enable two-way SMS so customers reply and interact, with responses routed into your systems or team inbox.

seo.title: WhatsApp Business Solution | Fillip Technologies
seo.description: WhatsApp Business API, chatbots, and broadcast campaigns - engage customers with automated conversations, notifications, and support at scale.

hero.title: WhatsApp Business That
hero.description: WhatsApp Business API, chatbots, and broadcasts that meet customers where they already are - automated conversations, notifications, and support at scale.

solutions.title: WhatsApp Business API
solutions.description: Official API setup with verified business profile, so you message customers reliably and at scale.

solutions.title: Chatbots & Automation
solutions.description: Automated flows that answer FAQs, qualify leads, and route conversations to your team instantly.

solutions.title: Broadcast Campaigns
solutions.description: Compliant, template-based broadcasts for offers, updates, and re-engagement to opted-in audiences.

solutions.title: CRM Integration
solutions.description: Connect WhatsApp to your CRM and helpdesk so every conversation is tracked and actioned.

faqs.question: What is the WhatsApp Business API?
faqs.answer: It is the official platform for businesses to message customers at scale with automation, verified profiles, and template messaging - beyond what the standard app allows.

faqs.question: Can you build a chatbot for us?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design and build automated conversation flows that handle FAQs, qualify leads, and hand off to a human agent when needed.

faqs.question: Are broadcast messages compliant?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use approved message templates and opted-in audiences to keep campaigns compliant with WhatsApp's policies and protect your number.

faqs.question: Does it integrate with our CRM?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We integrate WhatsApp with your CRM and helpdesk so conversations and leads flow into your existing workflows.
